name: NATIONAL FUEL GAS CO
summary: PARTI The Company and its Subsidiaries National Fuel Gas Company (the Registrant), incorporated in 1902, is a holding company organized under the laws of the State of New Jersey. The Registrant owns directly or indirectly all of the outstanding securities of its subsidiaries. Reference to the Company in this report means the Registrant, the Registrant and its subsidiaries or the Registrants subsidiaries as appropriate in the context of the disclosure.
